question: Design a `Book` class that encapsulates attributes like `title`, `author`, and `isbn` (all strings). Include a constructor to initialize these attributes and a `displayInfo()` method to print all book details.

test_cases.input: The Lord of the Rings,J.R.R. Tolkien,978-0618260274
test_cases.expected:
Book Details:
  Title:  The Lord of the Rings
  Author: J.R.R. Tolkien
  ISBN:   978-0618260274

Book Details:
  Title:  To Kill a Mockingbird
  Author: Harper Lee
  ISBN:   978-0061120084

Book Details:
  Title:  
  Author: Unknown
  ISBN:
